title: Presidential Nominations Submitted to the Senate for Multiple Executive Branch Positions
summary: The President submitted nominations to the Senate for various executive branch positions, including Erin Browne of New York to be Under Secretary of the Treasury replacing Jay Curtis Shambaugh who resigned, Brian Cavanaugh of Maryland to be Under Secretary for Management at the Department of Homeland Security replacing Claire M. Grady, and Thomas B. Chapman of Maryland to be a Member of the National Transportation Safety Board, among other positions.

title: Presidential Sequestration Order for Fiscal Year 2027
summary: Executive order issued pursuant to section 251A of the Balanced Budget and Emergency Deficit Control Act implementing automatic spending reductions to direct spending budgetary resources for fiscal year 2027, effective October 1, 2026. The order authorizes the reduction of discretionary spending across federal agencies as provided under the statutory framework established by the Balanced Budget and Emergency Deficit Control Act of 1985.

title: Proclamation on Adjustment of Pharmaceutical and Pharmaceutical Ingredient Imports Based on National Security Review
summary: This proclamation implements adjustments to imports of pharmaceuticals and pharmaceutical ingredients into the United States following a national security investigation conducted by the Secretary of Commerce under section 232 of the Trade Expansion Act of 1962. The Secretary's report examined the effects of pharmaceutical imports on United States national security and the proclamation establishes modifications to import policies based on the findings of that investigation.

title: Proclamation on Adjusting Imports of Aluminum, Steel, and Copper Into the United States
summary: This presidential proclamation modifies and strengthens previous trade adjustment measures affecting imports of aluminum, steel, and copper into the United States. The proclamation references and amends Proclamation 9704 from March 8, 2018 regarding aluminum imports, Proclamation 9705 from March 8, 2018 regarding steel imports, and Proclamation 10962 from July 30, 2025 regarding copper imports. The document establishes tariff or quota adjustments to regulate the volume and terms of trade for these specific commodities entering the United States market.

title: Executive Order on Citizenship Verification Requirements in Federal Elections
summary: This executive order directs federal agencies to implement citizenship verification procedures in federal elections. The order cites authority under the Help America Vote Act of 2002 and the National Voter Registration Act of 1993, as well as constitutional provisions regarding the federal government's role in ensuring electoral processes. The order establishes requirements for verifying voter citizenship status in connection with federal elections.

title: Memorandum on Compensation for Transportation Security Administration Personnel During Government Shutdown
summary: Presidential memorandum directing the Secretary of Homeland Security and the Director of the Office of Management and Budget to ensure continued payment of Transportation Security Administration officers and employees during a Department of Homeland Security government shutdown. The memorandum addresses operational continuity concerns related to air transportation security during the period of lapsed appropriations.
